finding: Your headline says what it is. They're looking for what it does for them.

hook_variants: Your [X] is visible. Most founders don't know it's their biggest leak.
I audited [N] pages. [X]% had the same problem.
You spent [amount] on ads. Your [X] is costing you half.
brief.cta_text: Comment 'AUDIT' and I'll send you a free landing page teardown.
